data.descriptionShort: Commit to 100 workouts & build strength while you melt away fat.
data.descriptionLong: Torch calories with high-intensity cardio and resistance training, while a live DJ turns up the energy as you burn off pounds. Your goal: complete 100 workouts and unlock the best version of you.

modules.categories: Cardio, MMA Training, HIIT, Core, Strength, Weight Loss

modules.title: Is Morning Meltdown 100 Right For Me?
modules.content: Morning Meltdown 100 is meant for anyone looking to make a commitment to complete 100 workouts. Although an intermediate level program, Morning Meltdown 100 offers an on screen modifier option so there is never an excuse to quit–especially when a live DJ makes it feel like a party!

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: Jericho splits the 100 workouts into 5 phases, 20 workouts in each phase. You’ll complete 10 workouts, then crank up the intensity by adding challenges to the next 10. At 20–30 minutes each, you might want to do two a day as you get stronger.

modules.title: Empowering Tools For Mind & Body
modules.content: The center of your journey is the Be 100 Book, a daily motivational tool to help you track workouts, discover your potential, and guide your day-to-day commitment as you achieve each new milestone. The program also includes a Nutrition Guide to help you lose weight the healthy way.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Natasha lost 34 inches doing Morning Meltdown 100!
modules.testimonial: I knew that committing to something for 100 days would help me make new habits and really kick start my weight loss. I have lost so much weight! I have more energy and endurance. I look forward to my morning workouts every day.
modules.disclaimer: Results vary depending on starting point and effort. Results achieved using Morning Meltdown 100, Ultimate Portion fix, Shakeology and BODi Performance supplements.. Natasha P. is an independent Team BODi Coach.
